narrative.description: Nintendo's compilation bundles Metroid Prime 1-3, translating Samus' isolation exploration into first-person scanning, ability-gated biomes, and atmospheric boss hunts across Tallon IV, Aether, and Corruption's galaxy.
narrative.core_loop: Scan environments for clues, acquire beams and suits to open new biomes, defeat bosses for key abilities, and unravel Space Pirate plots.

mechanics.map_notes: Three Metroid Prime games compiled with Wii controls and enhancements.
mechanics.expression: Three Metroid Prime games compiled with Wii controls and enhancements.

mechanics.map_notes: Beams, suits, and movement upgrades permanently unlock new regions.
mechanics.expression: Beams, suits, and movement upgrades permanently unlock new regions.

mechanics.map_notes: Morph ball tunnels and precision jumps viewed from first-person perspective.
mechanics.expression: Morph ball tunnels and precision jumps viewed from first-person perspective.

mechanics.map_notes: Late abilities reveal hidden items in earlier zones.
mechanics.expression: Late abilities reveal hidden items in earlier zones.

mechanics.map_notes: Major bosses grant artifacts and abilities gating story progress.
mechanics.expression: Major bosses grant artifacts and abilities gating story progress.

mechanics.map_notes: Logbook scans, item expansions, and sequence breaks reward mastery.
mechanics.expression: Logbook scans, item expansions, and sequence breaks reward mastery.

mechanics.map_notes: Lava, dark worlds, and Phazon corruption alter traversal rules.
mechanics.expression: Lava, dark worlds, and Phazon corruption alter traversal rules.

mechanics.map_notes: Energy tanks expand health depleted by enemy and hazard hits.
mechanics.expression: Energy tanks expand health depleted by enemy and hazard hits.

mechanics.map_notes: Save stations and shuttle rides checkpoint progress.
mechanics.expression: Save stations and shuttle rides checkpoint progress.

mechanics.map_notes: Bosses like Ridley and Meta Ridley follow phase patterns.
mechanics.expression: Bosses like Ridley and Meta Ridley follow phase patterns.

mechanics.map_notes: Prime and Dark Samus fights span multiple arena forms.
mechanics.expression: Prime and Dark Samus fights span multiple arena forms.

mechanics.map_notes: Boss charge attacks telegraph with audio and visual wind-up.
mechanics.expression: Boss charge attacks telegraph with audio and visual wind-up.

mechanics.map_notes: Beams fire immediately with lock-on assist.
mechanics.expression: Beams fire immediately with lock-on assist.

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Metroid Prime Trilogy through its core action-adventure loop.
